'''鈭歫-v-b''' ('''javaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanny|nanny]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanny|nanny]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-v-b
|-
! Lemma
| javaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:javabithi|javabithi]] || [[word:javabiji|javabiji]] || [[word:javabishi|javabishi]] || [[word:javabi|javabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javabuthuth|javabuthuth]] || [[word:javabujuj|javabujuj]] || [[word:javabushush|javabushush]] || [[word:javab|javab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javabuthu|javabuthu]] || [[word:javabuju|javabuju]] || [[word:javabushu|javabushu]] || [[word:javabu|javabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javabufuth|javabufuth]] || [[word:javabufuj|javabufuj]] || [[word:javabufush|javabufush]] || [[word:javabuf|javabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:javabethe|javabethe]] || [[word:javabeje|javabeje]] || [[word:javabeshe|javabeshe]] || [[word:javabe|javabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:javabothoth|javabothoth]] || [[word:javabojoj|javabojoj]] || [[word:javaboshosh|javaboshosh]] || [[word:javab|javab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:javabotho|javabotho]] || [[word:javabojo|javabojo]] || [[word:javabosho|javabosho]] || [[word:javabo|javabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:javabofoth|javabofoth]] || [[word:javabofoj|javabofoj]] || [[word:javabofosh|javabofosh]] || [[word:javabof|javabof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:javab茂f茂f|javab茂f茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f茂f|javab茂f茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f茂f|javab茂f茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f茂f|javab茂f茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]] || [[word:javab茂f|javab茂f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:javab忙th忙|javab忙th忙]] || [[word:javab忙j忙|javab忙j忙]] || [[word:javab忙sh忙|javab忙sh忙]] || [[word:javab忙|javab忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:javabathath|javabathath]] || [[word:javabajaj|javabajaj]] || [[word:javabashash|javabashash]] || [[word:javab|javab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:javabatha|javabatha]] || [[word:javabaja|javabaja]] || [[word:javabasha|javabasha]] || [[word:javaba|javaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:javabafath|javabafath]] || [[word:javabafaj|javabafaj]] || [[word:javabafash|javabafash]] || [[word:javabaf|javabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:javabasha|javabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojavabasha|gojavabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijavabasha|gokijavabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:javabn眉sha|javabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojavabnkn眉sha|gojavabnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijavabn眉sha|gokijavabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:javabsh毛sha|javabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojavabnksh毛sha|gojavabnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijavabsh毛sha|gokijavabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:javabrosha|javabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavabnkrosha|gojavabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavabrosha|gokijavabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:javabmusha|javabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavabnkmusha|gojavabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavabmusha|gokijavabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:javabsherasha|javabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojavabnksherasha|gojavabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijavabsherasha|gokijavabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:javabngasha|javabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojavabnkngasha|gojavabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijavabngasha|gokijavabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:javabyasha|javabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojavabnkyasha|gojavabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijavabyasha|gokijavabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:javabyamasha|javabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojavabnkyamasha|gojavabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijavabyamasha|gokijavabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:javabn眉sh毛sha|javabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojavabnkn眉sh毛sha|gojavabnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijavabn眉sh毛sha|gokijavabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:javabn眉rosha|javabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavabnkn眉rosha|gojavabnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavabn眉rosha|gokijavabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javabn眉musha|javabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavabnkn眉musha|gojavabnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavabn眉musha|gokijavabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:javabsh毛n眉sha|javabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojavabnksh毛n眉sha|gojavabnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijavabsh毛n眉sha|gokijavabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:javabsh毛rosha|javabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavabnksh毛rosha|gojavabnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavabsh毛rosha|gokijavabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javabsh毛musha|javabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavabnksh毛musha|gojavabnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavabsh毛musha|gokijavabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:javabron眉sha|javabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojavabnkron眉sha|gojavabnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijavabron眉sha|gokijavabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:javabrosh毛sha|javabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojavabnkrosh毛sha|gojavabnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijavabrosh毛sha|gokijavabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javabromusha|javabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavabnkromusha|gojavabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavabromusha|gokijavabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:javabmun眉sha|javabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojavabnkmun眉sha|gojavabnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijavabmun眉sha|gokijavabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:javabmush毛sha|javabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojavabnkmush毛sha|gojavabnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijavabmush毛sha|gokijavabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:javabmurosha|javabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojavabnkmurosha|gojavabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijavabmurosha|gokijavabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:javab|javab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙v忙b|j忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojavab|hojavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙v忙b|hoj忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojavab|hohojavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙v忙b|hohoj忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉javab|n眉javab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙v忙b|n眉j忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉javab|n眉n眉javab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙v忙b|n眉n眉j忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂javab|n茂javab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙v忙b|n茂j忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂javab|n茂n茂javab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙v忙b|n茂n茂j忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujavab|lujavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙v忙b|luj忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujavab|lulujavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙v忙b|luluj忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijavab|lijavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙v忙b|lij忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijavab|lilijavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙v忙b|lilij忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojavab|kojavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙v忙b|koj忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojavab|kokojavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙v忙b|kokoj忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejavab|kejavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙v忙b|kej忙v忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejavab|kekejavab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙v忙b|kekej忙v忙b]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
